HYPNOSISCREATOR-FETISH_BOG.title: Fetish Bog
HYPNOSISCREATOR-FETISH_BOG.description: Reveal the fetishes of those you face. When you take an action that hits a fetish, apply Doom.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-FETISH_BOG.flavor: Once you sink in, you don't climb out.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-FETISH_ABYSS.title: Fetish Abyss
HYPNOSISCREATOR-FETISH_ABYSS.description: Reveal the fetishes of those you face. When you take an action that hits a fetish, apply Doom. Fetish Doom is increased by [blue]50%[/blue].
HYPNOSISCREATOR-FETISH_ABYSS.flavor: Deeper than the bog. Quieter than thought.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-HYPNOSIS_TOOLKIT.title: Hypnosis Toolkit
HYPNOSISCREATOR-HYPNOSIS_TOOLKIT.descrip: At the start of combat, draw up to [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Count[/gold] cards from your draw pile before your normal draw.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-HYPNOSIS_METRONOME.title: Hypnosis Metronome
HYPNOSISCREATOR-HYPNOSIS_METRONOME.descr: At the start of the first turn, apply {Trance:diff()} Trance to all opponents.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-STOLEN_HEART.title: Stolen Heart
HYPNOSISCREATOR-STOLEN_HEART.description: At the start of combat, gain 2 [gold]Block[/gold] for each Stolen Heart you own.
